$comment: Seed registry. Update this file every time a tool is added, changed, or retired. Tool Manager Agent reads/writes this.

tools.name: fact_check_tool
tools.description: Wraps web search/fetch with the channel's fixed source-priority ranking.
tools.provider: Anthropic web_search tool or equivalent search API

tools.name: elevenlabs_voice_tool
tools.description: Provider-agnostic voiceover generation wrapper; default provider ElevenLabs Studio. generate_music() (Eleven Music API) is now the background-music FALLBACK only, superseded by Tools/royalty_free_music_tool.md as default since it costs per-generation credits. Real live-test of generate_music blocked by a missing music_generation permission on the current API key.
tools.input_schema_ref: text: string, voice_id: string, chapter: string | mood_prompt: string, duration_seconds: number

tools.name: image_gen_tool
tools.description: Provider-agnostic image generation wrapper. Default: fal.ai + Flux schnell (real API, near-free at test volume). Leonardo/Replicate as fallback. Midjourney excluded from automation (no official API).

tools.name: remotion_assembly_tool
tools.description: Programmatic video assembly: audio + images + timing + burned-in captions (fixed 2026 karaoke-style spec) + effects. Renders both the 16:9 main video and 9:16 Shorts selected by Agents/shorts_agent.md.
tools.input_schema_ref: scenes: object[], audio_track: string, background_music_track: string, subtitle_track: string

tools.name: youtube_publish_tool
tools.description: Wraps YouTube Data API v3 upload + metadata; publish call is human-gated.

tools.name: seo_export_tool
tools.description: Formats SEO Agent's structured output into Templates/SEO.md.

tools.name: github_sync_tool
tools.description: Checks/updates tool_registry.json and commits studio changes to GitHub.

tools.name: mugshot_fetch_tool
tools.description: Two-track real-photo sourcing. Track 1: person photos (mugshot/court exhibit) from official public-record sources only, always eyes-redacted before use. Track 2: non-person photos (scenes/buildings/evidence) from any source including news articles, per the channel owner's 2026-07-19 risk decision. Unblocked after real newsworthy-exception research; Fairfax County FOIA-only access for person photos remains a separate manual constraint.
tools.input_schema_ref: case_name: string, subjects: object[], scene_targets: object[]
tools.output_schema_ref: person_images: object[], scene_images: object[], not_found: object[]
tools.provider: county sheriff / state DOC inmate lookup / court press releases (person track); any outlet (scene track)

tools.name: royalty_free_music_tool
tools.description: Confirmed 2026-07-19 (direct read of Pixabay's API docs): no free music source checked has a public API. Finalized approach: channel owner hand-picked 10 tracks from Pixabay Music, stored at ProductionStudio/Assets/audio/music_bed/bed_01.mp3..bed_10.mp3 (gitignored). get_bed_track() picks one and loops/trims it per render (main video or Short) — no live search needed. Stage 1 live-tested 2026-07-19: all 10 files verified as valid MP3s (mutagen), real durations read (99-504s), pick-and-loop math confirmed against the real Banfield case (main video + 2 Shorts).
tools.provider: Pixabay Music (10 hand-picked tracks, local); ElevenLabs Music (automated fallback, paid)
